citation_label: CRA Schedule NB(S12) 2025 New Brunswick Seniors' Home Renovation Tax Credit
heading: CRA Schedule NB(S12) 2025 New Brunswick Seniors' Home Renovation Tax Credit
body:
Title: CRA Schedule NB(S12) 2025 New Brunswick seniors' home renovation tax credit.

Source:
- https://www.canada.ca/content/dam/cra-arc/formspubs/pbg/5004-s12/5004-s12-25e.txt
- https://www.canada.ca/content/dam/cra-arc/formspubs/pbg/5004-s12/5004-s12-25e.pdf

NB(S12) numeric source values for encoded amounts, rates, thresholds, caps, and limits:
Value: 10000
Value: 0.10

CRA Schedule NB(S12) 2025 calculates the New Brunswick seniors' home renovation tax credit. Line 1 totals eligible expenses from sales slips and contracts. Line 2 subtracts government assistance received or receivable. Line 3 caps the result at $10,000. Line 4 subtracts eligible expenses included on line 3 that are claimed by other eligible individuals. Line 5 and line 60360 are the home renovation expenses after that subtraction. Line 6 gives the applicable rate as 10%. Line 7 multiplies line 5 by 10% and enters the New Brunswick seniors' home renovation tax credit on T1 line 47900.
